source_jobs.title: Brand Content & Digital Marketing Intern - HaveMore.Space
source_jobs.description:
Apprenticely is working with our company partner, the HaveMore.Space to add a Brand Content & Digital Marketing Intern to their team in Bentonville, Arkansas!
 
Our Apprenticely Internship Program is a three-month program that places selected candidates with employers across Arkansas in IT positions to gain experience under the guidance of a professional mentor/IT support team. Internships are designed as an on-ramp to an IT career and can roll into full-time positions based on employer demand.
 
About HMS: 
HMS is bringing consent education to universities, starting with the University of Central Arkansas. This intern is totally accountable for building the digital infrastructure behind our university go-to-market — defining how a campus rollout actually works and producing the content and assets that power it, so the model is repeatable at every campus that follows.
 
What You'll Own:  
University GTM playbook: Document the end-to-end campus rollout — what happens, in what order, who does what — so any future campus can run it.
Digital asset library: Produce the content and collateral (social, campus-facing materials, brand assets) that the rollout runs on, built in Canva to the HMS brand system.
Social content: Plan and produce content for @havemore.sex to build presence ahead of campus launches.
Systems & documentation: Organize assets and workflows into a clean, handoff-ready system.
12-Week Outcome (Definition of Done): 
A documented university go-to-market playbook plus v1 of the digital asset library — together forming the repeatable infrastructure HMS uses to launch on each new campus.

source_jobs.title: Digital Marketer Intern-Align AI
source_jobs.description:
Apprenticely is working with our company partner, Align AI Solutions, to add a Digital Marketer Intern to their team in Bentonville, Arkansas!
 
Our Apprenticely Internship Program is a three-month program that places selected candidates with employers across Arkansas in IT positions to gain experience under the guidance of a professional mentor/IT support team. Internships are designed as an on-ramp to an IT career and can roll into full-time positions based on employer demand.
 
About Align AI Solutions:
Align AI Solutions helps businesses find and eliminate bottlenecks by designing AI and automation solutions that free teams to focus on high-impact work, with value-based pricing and no long-term lock-in. You get systems built for your business, owned by you, that deliver ongoing ROI.

source_jobs.title: Digital Marketing Operations Intern - SEO Counselors
source_jobs.description:
Apprenticely is helping SEO Counselors hire a Digital Marketing Operations Intern in Bentonville, AR. 
About the Employer: 
SEO Counselors is a digital marketing agency that partners with small and medium-sized businesses to strengthen their online presence through SEO, AI-assisted content creation, website management, Google Business Profile optimization, lead generation, and marketing operations.
We’re looking for a motivated, curious, and adaptable intern who wants hands-on experience supporting real businesses. This is a generalist role where you’ll gain exposure to multiple areas of digital marketing, including SEO, websites, AI, CRM management, content creation, and marketing operations.
Rather than specializing in one area, you’ll work alongside a collaborative team while learning the modern marketing tools and technologies that help small businesses grow.

source_jobs.title: General Interest - Resume Drop-off
source_jobs.description:
Let us support your path to a tech career in Arkansas by dropping off a resume here. We will reach-out with training resources and job opportunities with out company partners.
 
Individuals with technology focused training and experience find their skills in demand throughout the state of Arkansas. Many jobs and training programs in the technology professions can be done from the comfort of your own home. Technology professions in all industries rely on a diverse workforce to ultimately reach success and you can be a part of that success!

source_jobs.title: Go-To-Market Intern - Foreko
source_jobs.description:
Apprenticely is working with our company partner, the Foreko to add a Growth Operations Intern to their team in Bentonville, Arkansas!
 
Our Apprenticely Internship Program is a three-month program that places selected candidates with employers across Arkansas in IT positions to gain experience under the guidance of a professional mentor/IT support team. Internships are designed as an on-ramp to an IT career and can roll into full-time positions based on employer demand.
 
About Foreko:
Foreko is the smart procurement operating system that forecasts, automates, and executes. We replace manual spreadsheet chaos with AI-powered data ingestion, machine learning demand forecasting, and agentic order execution, giving founders back their time and their confidence in their numbers. We are early, growing fast, and headquartered in Bentonville, Arkansas.
 
About the Role: 
This is not a traditional marketing internship. As a Go-to-Market Engineer Intern, you sit at the intersection of marketing, data, and technology. You'll build the systems, automations, and infrastructure that make our GTM machine run: marketing ops, CRM workflows, data pipelines, attribution, and AI-powered growth experiments.

source_jobs.title: Go-To-Market Intern - HaveMore.Space
source_jobs.description:
Apprenticely is working with our company partner, the HaveMore.Space to add a Go-to-Market Intern to their team in Bentonville, Arkansas!
 
Our Apprenticely Internship Program is a three-month program that places selected candidates with employers across Arkansas in IT positions to gain experience under the guidance of a professional mentor/IT support team. Internships are designed as an on-ramp to an IT career and can roll into full-time positions based on employer demand.
 
About HMS: 
HMS sells consent education and a fast-growing consumer brand across multiple channels. This intern clears every operational block between where we are today and being sellable everywhere — owning the buildout of our full storefront stack and getting product live, tracked, and selling.
 
What You'll Own:  
Storefront buildout: Stand up and optimize HMS across Shopify, Amazon, and TikTok Shop — TikTok Shop is the priority launch lane.
Catalog & listings: Clean product data, listings, images, and pricing across all channels.
Tracking & attribution: Wire up Incarts shortlinks and connect Meta Business Manager assets.
Reporting: Build a simple dashboard showing what's selling by channel so the team can act on it.
12-Week Outcome (Definition of Done): 
All three storefronts live and selling, with TikTok Shop launched, catalog clean, tracking in place, and first orders flowing across channels.

source_jobs.title: Graphic Design / Marketing  Intern - Collab Design Co.
source_jobs.description:
Apprenticely is helping Collab Design Co. hire a Website Designer & Developer Intern in Rogers, AR. 
About the Role: 
We're looking for a creative, curious, and motivated Designer to join our growing team in Downtown Rogers.
At Collab Design Co., we partner with small businesses and growing brands to strengthen their branding, websites, social media, and overall marketing presence. We're looking for someone who enjoys variety, loves learning new skills, and is excited to contribute across multiple creative disciplines.
While website design and development will be a major focus of this role, you'll also support graphic design projects, social media marketing, content creation, and other marketing initiatives. This is an excellent opportunity for someone early in their career who wants to gain experience across multiple areas of marketing and design while growing alongside a collaborative agency.

source_jobs.title: Medical Assistant
source_jobs.description:
Apprenticely is working with our company partner, the Eras Women's Health to add a Medical Assistant Intern to their team in Fayetteville, Arkansas!
 
Our Apprenticely Internship Program is a three-month program that places selected candidates with employers across Arkansas in IT positions to gain experience under the guidance of a professional mentor/IT support team. Internships are designed as an on-ramp to an IT career and can roll into full-time positions based on employer demand.
 
About our Company Partner:
Eras is a modern, women-led clinic reimagining hormonal, gynecologic, and primary care for women across every era of life. Built by women who wanted something better, we blend board-certified clinical expertise with longer visits, an empathetic and collaborative care team, and a one-stop model that treats the whole woman — not just her symptoms.
 
Based in Fayetteville, Arkansas, our APRN-led practice brings together primary care, gynecology, and longevity services under one roof, creating a personalized experience that evolves with each patient’s needs. We listen first, partner always, and believe every woman deserves care that’s personal, preventive, and participatory. 
 
About the role: 
The Medical Assistant (MA) at Eras Women’s Health is a key member of our clinical support team, working under the direct supervision of the Lead RN and clinical providers. This role is essential to delivering smooth, high-quality patient experiences across routine gynecological visits, in-office procedures, and primary care for women. The MA is the front line of patient interaction — responsible for rooming, vital signs, chart preparation, patient communication, and day-to-day clinical coordination.

source_jobs.title: Military Career Fairs - Resume Drop Off
source_jobs.description:
Apprenticely is interested in Supporting our Military and their families in a new career.

Do you need help understanding what skills transfer from your MOS to the Civilian world? Most skills do, we would be happy to help you with navigating those on your resume and practice interviewing. 

Apprenticely is a non-profit that helps candidates find careers through Apprenticeships, which are full-time paid jobs that offer a mentor, training, and a growing career.

source_jobs.title: ReSkill Arkansas - IT Training
source_jobs.description:
ReSkill Arkansas is a statewide initiative dedicated to helping career seekers become IT professionals. We welcome career seekers from all backgrounds, experiences, and abilities. Whether you're a beginner to IT, returning to the workforce, or seeking a career change, our team provides FREE self-paced training courses at home. 
 
In addition to these training courses, we offer comprehensive career development services, including resume critiques and interview coaching, to further enhance your career readiness.  We believe in reducing barriers and providing support to ensure equal opportunities for success. If you require any accommodations or additional assistance, please don't hesitate to contact us.
 
By joining ReSkill, you can gain the necessary skills to qualify for paid internship and apprenticeship opportunities with our company partners. We want to help increase the technical skills of Arkansans and make you aware of the IT career paths available! Let us support your growth and success in this exciting field! 
 
 
Training Courses Include:
-IT Support Fundamentals
-Networking
-PC Security and Cybersecurity
-CompTIA A+ Test Prep
-Cloud Computing and Automation
-Web Development and Programming
-Data Analytics
-UX/UI
-Project Management
-Digital Marketing and E-Commerce

source_jobs.title: Social Media & Content Marketing Intern - Served
source_jobs.description:
Apprenticely is working with our company partner, the Served AI  to add a  Social & Marketing Intern to their team in Bentonville, Arkansas!
 
Our Apprenticely Internship Program is a three-month program that places selected candidates with employers across Arkansas in IT positions to gain experience under the guidance of a professional mentor/IT support team. Internships are designed as an on-ramp to an IT career and can roll into full-time positions based on employer demand.
 
About Served AI: 
Every night, 150 million households open the fridge and ask the same three words: what's for dinner? Decision fatigue wins, and dinner becomes a DoorDash default.

We're fixing that. Served is an agentic kitchen intelligence platform — point your phone at your pantry, fridge, or counter and our conversational AI, Chef, knows what you have, learns what you actually eat, and handles the loop: decide → shop → cook → restock. Scan your kitchen. Get personalized recipes. Replenish groceries automatically. Stop thinking about it.

Under the hood it's a two-sided machine: free for households, monetized through a CPG trade desk — the retail media network for kitchens. We've closed early capital, we're heads-down taking it from MVP to market, and our team comes from Google, Citadel, and Walmart.

We're building the world's first true agentic kitchen. We want someone to help the world hear about it.
 
About the Role: 
You'll own how Served shows up in the world. Not coffee runs and recycled captions — real, public-facing content that ships, gets measured, and shapes what we do next. You'll work directly with the founders and sit at the center of the brand voice: futuristic but simple, declarative, a little swagger. Think how the best AI companies talk — clean lines, big vision, zero fluff.
